title: funkiella markowskiana
intro: Funkiella markowskiana, also known as Funk's moss or Funk's liverwort, is a type of liverwort, a non-vascular plant that belongs to the division Marchantiophyta. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of liver and kidney disorders, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Funkiella markowskiana include its ability to improve liver function, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Funkiella markowskiana is often used in the form of dried powder or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to make tonics and remedies.
